case_title: WOODCOCK, ROBERT vs. PALADINO, JARNET ESTRADA AKA ANA COMPOS et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT PALADINO, JARNET ESTRADA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALADINO, JARNET ESTRADA AKA ANA COMPOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1449 SO. VAN NESS AVE, APT #4, S.F., STAYED UNTIL JUL-08-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. $800- SECURITY DEPOSIT APPLIED TO JUNE 1997 RENT. RENT FOR MAY WAIVED. IF DEFT PAYS PLTF $700- ON OR BEFORE 7/8/97 EXECUTION STAYED TILL 8/4/97 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS BEYOND 8/4/97. NO OTHER ADULTS WHO CAN CLAIM RIGHT OF POSSESSION. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
